name: Shrunk in the Dorms (W.I.P.)
description:
Oh no! You’ve shrunken in your college dorms!

This is a wip, I want everyone to test it to see if it’s good!!!

You’ve got options of (not in order)

A bimbo gyaru

A scene girl

A spoiled brat + her sweet sister

A punk

A goth

Annnd a emo!
creator: GothPerv
